questionText: Your opponent bets $50. You want to stay in the hand. What do you do?
explanation: You cannot 'Check' if someone has bet. You must 'Call' (match the $50) to see the next card.

questionText: No one has bet yet. You don't want to put money in, but you want to keep your cards.
explanation: Check! It's free. Never fold if you can check for free.

questionText: You have a terrible hand and your opponent bets huge.
explanation: Fold. Live to fight another day. Save your chips.

questionText: You have the best hand and want to grow the pot.
explanation: Raise! Force them to pay more to see your cards.
All-in means pushing every single chip into the middle. The ultimate move.
